requirements.source_document: Attachments to the ICTPA Conditions of Deed.md
requirements.requirement_text: Supplier must comply with the Governance Framework.
Supplier must propose Key Persons for the Work Order.
Supplier must propose any Subcontractors for the Work Order.
The Supplier must participate in Performance Reviews conducted by the Commonwealth.
The Supplier must support reporting aligned to performance measurement and review cycles.
The Supplier must submit a draft AIC Schedule as part of the RFQ response.
The Supplier must participate in meetings as defined in the SOW.
The Supplier must deliver services aligned to defined milestones.
The Supplier must provide personnel as required to deliver the services.
The Supplier must comply with security obligations, including Probity, Conflict of Interest, and Security Compliance.
The Supplier must operate within the defined technical environment.
The Supplier must provide pricing in accordance with SOW pricing structure.
